data.name: AttachmentIdIsMissing
data.value: 找不到id为{0}的附件

data.name: Attachments_Unsupported_content
data.value: 所上传的内容不被支持

data.name: Attachments_uploaded_file_is_not_image
data.value: 所上传的文件不是图片

data.name: CantMoveSubsectionInWrongPosition
data.value: 您不可以移动问卷子块{0}因为位置{1}不接受。

data.name: CantPasteQuestion
data.value: 问题不能粘贴到这里。

data.name: CantRemoveLastSectionInQuestionnaire
data.value: 最后一个存在的模块不能从此问卷移除

data.name: CantRemoveUserFromTheList
data.value: 无法移除该用户，因为她/他不在分享列表中

data.name: CategoricalCascadingOptionsCantContainsEmptyParentValueField
data.value: 级联问题的选项不允许有空的上级待选值列。

data.name: CategoricalCascadingOptionsCantContainsNotDecimalParentValueField
data.value: 级联问题的选项不允许有数值型的上级待选值列。

data.name: CategoricalCascadingOptionsContainsNotUniqueTitleAndParentValuePair
data.value: 至少有一个重复的标题 + 上级值配对。选项列表不应该包含任何此类重复。

data.name: ComboboxCannotBeFound
data.value: 无法找到带有公共键{0}的复选框型问题

data.name: FailedToAddGroup
data.value: 尝试添加组{0}进组{1}失败。但组{1}在文件{2}中不存在。

data.name: ImportOfDeletedQuestionnaire
data.value: 尝试导入已经被删除的问卷

data.name: InvalidFixedTitle
data.value: 无效的名称列表

data.name: InvalidValueOfFixedTitle
data.value: 固定系列项目的二维表值是必须的

data.name: ItemWithIdExistsAlready
data.value: 有相同ID{0}的一个或多个问卷已存在

data.name: LookupTableAlreadyExist
data.value: 此id的查询表已存在

data.name: LookupTableHasEmptyContent
data.value: ID为{0}的查询表已存在

data.name: LookupTableIsAbsent
data.value: 此id的查询表不存在

data.name: LookupTableIsMissing
data.value: id为{0}的查询表缺失

data.name: LookupTables_cant_has_empty_content
data.value: 没有数据的文件无法被导入

data.name: LookupTables_data_value_cannot_be_parsed
data.value: 值{0}无法被判别为十进制数字。列{1}，行{2}。

data.name: LookupTables_duplicating_headers_are_not_allowed
data.value: 不允许表头有相同的名字

data.name: LookupTables_empty_or_invalid_header_are_not_allowed
data.value: 不允许空的或无效的表头

data.name: LookupTables_rowcode_column_is_mandatory
data.value: 行编码列缺失

data.name: LookupTables_rowcode_value_cannot_be_parsed
data.value: 值{0}无法被判别为整形数字。列{1}，行{2}。

data.name: LookupTables_rowcode_values_must_be_unique
data.value: 行编码值必须唯一

data.name: LookupTables_too_many_columns
data.value: 上传文件的列数过多。最多{0}列

data.name: LookupTables_too_many_rows
data.value: 行数：{1}。已超过最大的行数（{0}行）限制

data.name: MacroAlreadyExist
data.value: 此宏（Macro）已存在。

data.name: MacroIsAbsent
data.value: 此宏（Macro）不存在。

data.name: MoreThanOneQuestionWithSameId
data.value: 有一个多个相同ID{0}的问题已经存在：{1}{2}。

data.name: MoreThanOneSubSectionWithSameId
data.value: 有一个多个相同ID{0}的问卷模块已经存在：{1}{2}。

data.name: NoPremissionsToEditQuestionnaire
data.value: 您无权修改此问卷

data.name: OldAttachmentIdIsEmpty
data.value: 旧附件 id 是空且附件{0}的文件缺失（问卷{1}）

data.name: OnlyQuestionnaireDocumentsAreSupported
data.value: 目前仅支持问卷文件

data.name: OptionValuesShouldBeNumbers
data.value: 选项值只能是数字

data.name: QuestionCannotBeFound
data.value: 带公共键{0}的问题无法被找到。

data.name: QuestionIsNotCombobox
data.value: 问题{0}不是复选框型

data.name: QuestionnaireCantBeFound
data.value: 无法找到id为{0}的问卷。

data.name: QuestionnaireRevisionCantBeFound
data.value: 无法找到问卷{0}的版本{1}

data.name: QuestionnaireTitleIsEmpty
data.value: 问卷标题不能为空或者只包含空格键。

data.name: QuestionTypeIsNotSupported
data.value: 问卷类型不被支持：{0}

data.name: RosterCantBePaste
data.value: 二维表无法粘贴到此。

data.name: SectionCantHaveMoreThan_Items
data.value: 该问卷模块不能有超过{0}个子项目

data.name: StaticTextCantBePaste
data.value: 静态文本无法粘贴到此。

data.name: SubSectionCantBeFound
data.value: 无法找到带公共键{0}的子问卷模块。

data.name: SubSectionDepthLimit
data.value: 子问卷模块或二维表的深度不能大于{0}。

data.name: TranlationExcelFileHasErrors
data.value: 在Excel文件中发现错误

data.name: TranslationCel_A_lIsInvalid
data.value: {0}在 [{1}] 有无效的id

data.name: TranslationCellIndexIsInvalid
data.value: {0}在 [{1}] 有无效的索引

data.name: TranslationCellTypeIsInvalid
data.value: {0}有无效的类型 [{1}]

data.name: TranslationFileIsEmpty
data.value: Excel文件为空 - 不包含任何sheet

data.name: TranslationsCantBeExtracted
data.value: 从上传的文件中解压出翻译失败

data.name: TranslationWorksheetIsMissing
data.value: 无法找到翻译的worksheet

data.name: UnknownTypeCantBePaste
data.value: 未知项目类型。粘贴失败。

data.name: UserIsInTheList
data.value: 用户{0}已在分享列表。

data.name: UserIsOwner
data.value: 用户{0}是本问卷的所有者。请输入另外一个email。

data.name: ValueOfFixedTitleCantBeParsed
data.value: 固定系列项目的二维表值只能为数字字符。

data.name: VariableCantBePaste
data.value: 变量无法粘贴到此。

data.name: VariableWithIdWasNotFound
data.value: id为{0}的变量无法在问卷{1}中找到

data.name: RequiredHeaderWasNotFound
data.value: 在excel文件中无法找到表头 {0}

data.name: CriticalRuleAlreadyExist
data.value: Critical rule already exists.

data.name: CriticalRuleIsAbsent
data.value: Critical rule is absent.

data.name: Attachments_uploaded_file_image_is_too_big
data.value: Image dimensions are too big

data.name: TranslationIsNotFull
data.value: The translation is incomplete and does not include all required texts for every element

data.name: CategoryTranslationIsNotFull
data.value: The category translation "{0}" is incomplete and does not include all options texts

data.name: QuestionnaireSuportedNewCover
data.value: Questionnaire already supports cover page.

data.name: SubsectionCantHaveMoreThan_DirectChildren
data.value: Section or sub-section cannot have more than {0} direct child items

data.name: CantRemoveCoverPageInQuestionnaire
data.value: Cover section cannot be removed from questionnaire

data.name: CoverPageMustBeFirstInQuestionnaire
data.value: Cover section must be first section in questionnaire

data.name: CoverPageCanContainsOnlyQuestionsAndStaticTextsAndVariables
data.value: Cover section can contain only questions, static texts and variables

data.name: CantEditCoverPageInOldQuestionnaire
data.value: It is readonly Cover section. You cannot edit or re-order questions in it.

data.name: InvalidUserInfo
data.value: Invalid user info.

data.name: ProvidedFileHasErrors
data.value: Found errors in provided file

data.name: CategoriesCantBeExtracted
data.value: Failed to extract categories from uploaded file

data.name: HeaderWasNotFound
data.value: Header was not found in file

data.name: NoParentCascadingOptions
data.value: No categories for parent cascading question '{0}' found

data.name: Column
data.value: column

data.name: Row
data.value: row

data.name: ImportOptions_MissingRequiredColumns
data.value: Some column(s) are missing. Make sure that you upload file with required columns

data.name: ImportOptions_EmptyValue
data.value: Empty value

data.name: ImportOptions_NotNumber
data.value: Invalid 32 bit integer value '{0}'. Value should be between -2147483647 and 2147483647

data.name: ImportOptions_ParentValueNotFound
data.value: Parent question doesn't have an category with value '{0}'

data.name: ImportOptions_DuplicateByTitleAndParentIds
data.value: Duplicated category '{0}' with parent value '{1}'

data.name: ImportOptions_DuplicatedParentValues
data.value: Parent question '{0}' has {1} categories with value '{2}'

data.name: ImportOptions_TitleTooLong
data.value: Title is too long. Title length should be less than {0}

data.name: ImportOptions_AttachmentNameTooLong
data.value: Attachment name is too long. Attachment name should be less than {0}

data.name: ImportOptions_ValueIsNotUnique
data.value: Duplicated category '{0}' with value '{1}'

data.name: Excel_Categories_Int_Invalid
data.value: [{0}] Invalid numeric value

data.name: Excel_Categories_Empty_Text
data.value: [{0}] Empty title

data.name: Excel_Categories_Empty_Value
data.value: [{0}] Empty value

data.name: Excel_Categories_Duplicated
data.value: Duplicated categories in rows: {0}

data.name: Excel_Categories_Empty_ParentId
data.value: Some categories don't have a parent id

data.name: Excel_Categories_More_Than_Limit
data.value: Categories set has more than {0} categories

data.name: Excel_NoCategories
data.value: No categories in file

data.name: Excel_Categories_Less_2_Options
data.value: Categories set should have at least 2 categories

data.name: Excel_Categories_Text_More_Than_250
data.value: [{0}] Text of category should be less than 250 characters

data.name: ImportOptions_Tab_Or_Excel_Only
data.value: Only tab-separated values (*.tab, *.txt, *.tsv) or excel (*.xslx, *.xls, *.ods) files are accepted

data.name: QuestionnaireAlreadySupportedCover
data.value: Questionnaire already supports cover

data.name: Questionnaire_CategoriesWereNotFound
data.value: Categories were not found
